message:
feat(engine): add signal registration with safe-mode triggers and DOM op budget enforcement

Add `register_signal()` method to `WasmRuntimeLane` that maps
`WasmGraphError` variants (DepthExceeded, BudgetExceeded) into
safe-mode reasons, providing automatic graph-error-to-safe-mode
escalation.  Enforce DOM op budget in `flush_dom_ops()` using
`saturating_add` with early break on limit breach, entering safe
mode with `DomOpBudgetExhausted` reason.

New tests:
- `dom_op_budget_basic_accounting` — verifies budget tracking and
  safe-mode entry on overflow
- `depth_exceeded_enters_safe_mode` — signal registration depth
  triggers safe mode
- `budget_exceeded_enters_safe_mode` — node-count budget triggers
  safe mode
- Two cross-lane tests comparing WASM vs JS graph behavior for
  depth and budget limits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
